narrative:
Cols 60-B (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,268 registered voters, with 63.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 15.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.2%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.9 percentage points.
